businessSummary.oneLiner: Government and commercial AI data analytics platform leader, operating a three-pillar system of Gotham (defense), Foundry (enterprise), and AIP (AI platform)
businessSummary.description: Palantir builds AI data analytics platforms for government and enterprise customers. FY2025 revenue of $4.48B (+60%). US commercial revenue surpassed $650M in Q4 (+137% YoY). The Pentagon designated Maven AI as an official program of record for military-wide deployment. FY2026 guidance of $7.19B-$7.41B (+60-65%) signals accelerating growth. However, the extreme Forward P/E of ~100x and the -3.75% selloff on 3/24 highlight valuation pressure.
howTheyMakeMoney: Enterprise AI platform (Foundry) - large enterprise data integration
AIP (AI Platform) - generative AI integration platform
AIP Boot Camp - rapid customer conversion program

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Extreme premium even among software stocks. Rule of 40 score of 127% partially justifies it, but deceleration risk could trigger sharp selloff

keyMetrics.name: P/S (Price-to-Sales)
keyMetrics.interpretation: 3-4x the SaaS average (10-15x). Palantir's growth rate (+60%) is the only justification

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth (FY2025)
keyMetrics.interpretation: 60% growth at this scale is extremely rare. Q4 was +70% YoY

keyMetrics.name: US Commercial Revenue Growth (Q4)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Explosive enterprise customer acquisition. Key driver reducing government dependency

keyMetrics.name: Rule of 40
keyMetrics.interpretation: Revenue growth + profit margin at 127%. Among the highest in the entire SaaS industry

keyMetrics.name: Net Dollar Retention (NDR)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Existing customers spending 39% more than prior year. Proves high product stickiness

growthDrivers.title: Maven AI Designated Official Pentagon Program of Record
growthDrivers.description: Pentagon officially designated Maven Smart System as a program of record (Reuters, 3/20). Military-wide long-term deployment confirmed, securing stable defense revenue base. PLTR surged 6.78% on 3/23 on this news

growthDrivers.title: UK FCA 3-Month Trial Contract
growthDrivers.description: UK Financial Conduct Authority adopted Palantir Foundry for a 3-month trial, paying £30K+ per week. Signal of expansion into government regulatory sectors beyond defense

growthDrivers.title: Iran War Live Combat AI Deployment
growthDrivers.description: Pentagon operating a system using Palantir + Anthropic AI to identify strike targets in Iran (NYT/Democracy Now). Combat verification is a powerful basis for additional contracts

growthDrivers.title: FY2026 Revenue Guidance $7.19B-$7.41B (+60-65%)
growthDrivers.description: Management confidently guiding for growth acceleration. US commercial segment emerging as the primary growth engine, reducing government dependency

growthDrivers.title: US Commercial Revenue Q4 +137% Explosion
growthDrivers.description: Q4 US commercial revenue of $650M (+137% YoY). 180 deals worth $1M+ and 61 deals exceeding $10M. AIP Boot Camp driving rapid customer conversion

growthDrivers.title: Wedbush Dan Ives Maintains $230 Target: 'Backbone of US Military AI'
growthDrivers.description: Wedbush's Dan Ives maintains $230 target, stating Maven's official adoption confirms Palantir as the US military's AI backbone

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 20+ years of government defense AI track record with top-level security clearances, Maven military-wide official adoption, UK FCA trial expanding into financial regulation. Combat verification is a moat money can't buy

moats.description: Ontology platform deeply integrated into government/military systems. Once deployed, replacement costs are prohibitively high
Top-level security clearances and 20+ years of government trust. Virtually impossible for new entrants to achieve equivalent access
AIP Boot Camp enables rapid customer acquisition while Ontology data model expands the ecosystem
Used for real-time strike target identification in the Iran conflict. Combat data as competitive advantage cannot be replicated

competitors.name: Anduril Industries
competitors.detail: Defense AI/drone startup. Hardware-focused, more complementary than competitive with Palantir's software platform

competitors.name: Snowflake / Databricks
competitors.detail: Enterprise data platform competition. But significantly behind Palantir in government/defense access

competitors.name: Microsoft / AWS
competitors.detail: Cloud giants entering government AI. Scale advantage but lack Palantir's specialized Ontology integration depth

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI platform. Significantly trailing Palantir in both revenue scale and growth rate

recentNews.headline: PLTR -3.75%: Profit-taking after Maven surge + tech selloff
recentNews.significance: After +6.78% surge on Maven news (3/23), stock fell -3.75% on 3/24 due to broader tech selloff and valuation concerns

recentNews.headline: Maven AI officially designated Pentagon Program of Record → +6.78%
recentNews.significance: Long-term military-wide deployment confirmed. Stable defense revenue base secured and case for additional contracts strengthened

recentNews.headline: UK FCA adopts Palantir Foundry for 3-month trial
recentNews.significance: Expansion into financial regulatory sector. Signal of government market diversification beyond defense

recentNews.headline: Iran war: Palantir + Anthropic AI used for strike target identification
recentNews.significance: Live combat AI deployment confirmed. 'Kill chain' acceleration with Palantir technology as core component

recentNews.headline: Analyst upgrade: Moderate Buy consensus, $196 target
recentNews.significance: Majority of 21 analysts rate Buy. Wide target range of $50-$260 reflects market's polarized view

analystOpinions.notableComment: Wedbush Dan Ives maintains $230 target: 'Maven adoption officially confirms Palantir as the backbone of US military AI.' Meanwhile Investing.com suggests $200-220 target with $140 stop-loss

risks.title: Extreme Valuation (Forward P/E ~100x)
risks.description: P/S of 44x and Forward P/E of 100x are historically unsustainable levels. Three prior 30%+ crashes prove the vulnerability

risks.title: Insider Selling
risks.description: Continued stock sales by CEO Alex Karp and other insiders are fueling market concerns

risks.title: Geopolitical Risk (Iran War)
risks.description: Combat deployment is positive for contracts, but war conclusion could reduce revenue. AI weaponization also raises ethical concerns

risks.title: International Government Revenue Stagnation
risks.description: US government and commercial growing rapidly, but international government revenue is not accelerating

risks.title: FCF Yield Below 1%
risks.description: FCF of $3-4B against $367B market cap. If growth premium is stripped, difficult to justify

buyReasons.title: Maven Official Adoption: Long-term Defense Revenue Confirmed
buyReasons.rationale: Military-wide Program of Record designation. Long-term, stable revenue base secured. Foundation for additional military contracts

buyReasons.title: US Commercial Revenue Explosion (+137%)
buyReasons.rationale: Q4 US commercial $650M (+137%). Reducing government dependency while expanding TAM. AIP Boot Camp as conversion engine

buyReasons.title: Rule of 40 Score of 127%
buyReasons.rationale: Among the highest in SaaS industry. Simultaneously achieving high growth and profitability. Overwhelming quality vs. competitors

buyReasons.title: Combat-Verified Moat
buyReasons.rationale: Real-time AI strike system operations in the Iran conflict. This experience cannot be bought or replicated by competitors

overallOpinion: Maven AI's official designation as a Pentagon Program of Record confirms long-term defense revenue. The UK FCA trial adds expansion into government regulatory sectors beyond defense.

US commercial revenue exploded at +137% in Q4, with FY2026 guidance of $7.2B (+61%). The Rule of 40 score of 127% is among the highest in SaaS history. However, Forward P/E of 100x and insider selling create valuation pressure.

At $154.78, down 25% from the 52-week high ($207.52). Trading above both 50-day and 200-day moving averages with a golden cross on 3/17. Technically positive, but the -3.75% on 3/24 signals short-term volatility.

investmentVerdict.summary: Maven official adoption, commercial revenue explosion, and Rule of 40 of 127% represent best-in-class fundamentals. But Forward P/E of 100x and P/S of 44x leave no room for error. Hold existing positions; new entries should wait for a pullback to $140 or below.

sources.name: Reuters
sources.description: Exclusive: Maven AI official Pentagon Program of Record designation

sources.name: Motley Fool
sources.description: +6.78% surge on Maven news and UK FCA trial coverage

sources.name: Democracy Now
sources.description: Iran war Palantir + Anthropic AI combat deployment

sources.name: TECHi
sources.description: Deep valuation analysis, Forward P/E 100x, Rule of 40 127%

sources.name: TradingKey
sources.description: 3/24 -3.75% decline analysis and insider selling mention

witty.hook: The US military just made Palantir official. At 100x P/E
witty.text:
$PLTR (3/25) $154.78 (-3.75%)

Pentagon officially adopted Maven. Palantir's war AI is also literally being used in war (Iran, with Anthropic). The UK's financial regulator signed up too. When both the Pentagon and the FCA want your product, you might actually be an 'N of 1.'

US commercial +137%, Rule of 40 at 127%. These are dream numbers. The nightmare number is Forward P/E 100x. At this valuation, one miss means 30%+ down. Three times proven.

Target $196 (+27%). Hold if you're in. New money? $140 is a better starting line.

empathy.hook: PLTR surged then gave it back in a day. Classic roller coaster
empathy.text:
$PLTR (3/25) $154.78 (-3.75%)

Monday's +6.78% Maven celebration, Tuesday's -3.75% hangover. Holding Palantir means signing up for this rhythm. It's exhausting.

But the Maven adoption is real and meaningful. Long-term military revenue is locked in. The UK FCA trial adds another dimension. US commercial at +137%, Rule of 40 at 127%. The fundamentals are as strong as they've ever been.

Forward P/E 100x guarantees emotional volatility. Target $196 (+27%). If you own it, hold. This volatility is the admission price for owning one of the best-growing software companies in the world.
